utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all details:
- property: includes selected property with details (name/type/location/accessibility/condition/closing date) and price. Fully specified.
- financing: includes financing solution (cash purchase) with terms/amount/source/benefits and remaining proceeds. Fully specified and aligned with request to explain options (at least one clear option provided).
- legal_services: includes provider, package, cost, date, status. Fully specified with costs.
- moving_services: includes provider, service, cost, date, features, status. Fully specified with costs.
- setup_services: includes service type, cost, includes list, activation date, status. Fully specified.
- total_budget: includes breakdown lines (purchase price, closing costs, legal, survey, moving, utility setup, total, net proceeds remaining). Fully specified.
All 6 items are present and detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings: the property 'Family House', financing type 'Cash Purchase', legal service 'Premium Legal Package', moving service matching 'Premium Moving' (same price and description), utility setup matching 'Premium Utilities' (same name and price), and a property survey cost matching 'Full Structural Survey' at CAD $650. I mapped each selected item to its rating from the provided ground-truth.
